name: TMB Grand Depart Transport Disruptions - Barcelona
summary: Official TMB notice confirms metro reinforcement and specific bus/metro disruptions on July 2, 4, and 5.
whyItMatters: This is the strongest current source for public transport planning during the two Barcelona viewing days and the non-viewing team presentation context.
pros: Confirms up to 40% more metro trains at key hours, especially lines 1 and 5
Lists Sagrada Familia L2 closure timing for July 2 and affected bus routes for July 4 and July 5
cons: Notice says it is still being prepared and may be updated
Bus route impacts are extensive and could change
Does not replace official city road-closure maps

logistics.opening_hours: Notice active for July 2, July 4, and July 5 event impacts
logistics.distance_from_viewing_point: Relevant to all Barcelona movement, especially Montjuic and Sagrada Familia areas
logistics.transit: Metro is the recommended mode. L2 Sagrada Familia will not stop from 13:00 on July 2 until the end of the team presentation event. Stage 1 and Stage 2 cause all-day bus impacts on many lines.
logistics.parking: Not covered by TMB; assume surface mobility is constrained and verify city parking/closure maps
logistics.road_closure_notes: Use this with the Ajuntament Grand Depart site route maps and official stage maps.

timing.best_visit_window: Check the notice the night before and morning of July 2, July 4, and July 5

sources.title: TMB - Tour de France
sources.note: Official TMB Grand Depart page confirming metro reinforcement, recommendation to use metro, and link to detailed service notice.

sources.title: TMB - Avis Tour 2026
sources.note: Official service notice with disruptions for July 2 team presentation, July 4 Stage 1, and July 5 Stage 2.

sources.title: Ajuntament de Barcelona - Tour de France Barcelona 2026
sources.note: Official Grand Depart organizer site linked from TMB for schedules, cities, and route context.

open_questions: Will TMB add exact metro crowd-control measures for Espanya, Paral-lel, Poble Sec, or other Montjuic-access stations?
Which bus route modifications matter most for the lodging location once lodging is known?
